series_metadata.series_description: Printed copies of requests submitted through the Ohio Law Enforcement Automated Data System (LEADS) specific to BCI. Such requests often concern request for sealed records or other non-computerized records. These printouts have been deemed no longer of use to the office as they are convenience copies to what is found in the LEADS system. Inclusive dates of the records are from 2013 to 2021.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: This is a one-time disposal of obsolete records. records will be disposed of upon approval of this retention schedule
